error_signature: array type not supported in Custom Code Tool
title: Array type not supported in Custom Code Tool
symptom: When running a code node configured with an array type input, the workflow fails to execute properly.
applies_when: Input schema includes an array type
not_this_if: Input schema uses only string or other supported types
root_cause: The n8n AI Agent tool has a known limitation where it does not support array types in the input schema for code nodes. This can lead to execution failures when the input is not compatible.
fix_steps: Change the input field type from array to string
agent_instruction: Change the input field type from array to string in the code node settings.
